title: SkillsFuture Mid-Career Training Allowance
text:
SkillsFuture Mid-Career Training Allowance - SupportGoWhere
SkillsFuture Mid-Career Training Allowance
Share link
Supports both full-time and part-time long-form training for Singapore Citizens aged 40 and above to upskill and reskill. Individuals can decide which type of training best suits their needs.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Training Allowance (TA) of up to $3,000 per month for full-time training, and a flat rate of $300 per month for part-time training
Up to 24 months of TA for each individual throughout their lifetime
Apply now / View application
Collapse all sections
About this support

Training Allowance (TA) for full-time, long-form training

50% of an individual's average earned monthly income in the latest 12 months before course start date, with a minimum allowance of $300 and a maximum allowance of $3,000 per month

Eligible for individuals who enrol in selected full-time, long-form training programmes

Eligible for individuals with income in the latest 12 months before course start date 

TA for part-time, long-form training

Flat rate of $300 per month

Eligible for employed individuals who enrol in selected part-time, long-form training programmes




Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen aged 40 and above pursuing selected full-time and part-time long-form training programmes

How to apply?

Visit MySkillsFuture Portal

Where can I find help?

View more details

SkillsFuture hotline: 6785 5785

Call Centre operating hours: 
Monday to Friday
8.30am to 5.30pm
Closed on Saturday, Sunday, and Public Holidays

Submit an enquiry

SkillsFuture Singapore 
1 Paya Lebar Link,
#08-08, Paya Lebar Quarter 2
Singapore 408533

Scheme last updated 10 Mar 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
